title: Check If Array Pairs Are Divisible by k
titleCn: 检查数组对是否可以被 k 整除

testcases.input: arr = [1,2,3,4,5,10,6,7,8,9], k = 5 Output: true Explanation: Pairs are (1,9),(2,8),(3,7),(4,6) and (5,10).
arr = [1,2,3,4,5,6], k = 7 Output: true Explanation: Pairs are (1,6),(2,5) and(3,4).
arr = [1,2,3,4,5,6], k = 10 Output: false Explanation: You can try all possible pairs to see that there is no way to divide arr into 3 pairs each with sum divisible by 10.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: You can try all possible pairs to see that there is no way to divide arr into 3 pairs each with sum divisible by 10.
